sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20440" key="botanolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοτᾰνο-λόγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20440.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gatherer of herbs</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
